subcodes.title: Haykal
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He before Whom … all that are in the heavens and all that are on earth, and all … He it is Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی … له من فی الیسموات و من فی الارض و کل له ... هو الذی ... من یشا (.illeg)
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @impossibility of true worship of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @da'iras and haykals, @education of children; moral education, @transcendence; unknowability of God
